title: Feature spec (FEAT) front-matter
description: Deterministic contract for the YAML front-matter of every specs/features/FEAT-##.spec.md file. Produced in Phase 2 (Spec Authoring). The COMPILER zones are regenerated verbatim from the member REQs by scripts/compile_specs.py and guarded by spec_hash; the FILL zones are authored by the Copilot cloud agent. Body-zone and hash rules are checked by scripts/validate_specs.py.

member_reqs.description: The atomic REQ ids composing this feature. Each REQ front-matter must point back with feature: <this id>.

spec_hash.description: SHA-256 over the COMPILER zones (lowercase hex). Recomputed and checked by scripts/compile_specs.py and scripts/validate_specs.py.
